§6Murky Anvil§f is a specialized crafting station for working with §bexotic materials§f.

§eCapabilities:§f
• Works with materials too exotic for standard anvils
• Required for certain end-game recipes
• Handles §bDineutronium§f and similar substances

§ePosition:§f
Later tier than Desh - approaching ultimate anvils.

§aTip:§f Stepping stone to §bDineutronium Anvil§f - the final tier.
